title: helianthus praetermissus
intro: Helianthus praetermissus, also known as the lesser prickly goldenrod, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various methods of extraction and use in alternative medicine.
